name: Enclave Magic
description: You increase your Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma score by 1, to a maximum of 20. You have advantage on ability checks when taking the Influence action with Beasts. You always have the Beast Sense spell prepared. You can cast it once without a spell slot and without requiring concentration, regaining the ability to do so after a long rest. You can also cast it using any spell slots you have. The spellcasting ability is the one increased by this feat.
